## Purpose

Runs the quest loop: variate -> score -> extract -> evolve rubric -> repeat until dual convergence. Tracks rounds, rubric versions, and excellence patterns. Produces a convergence report with the golden prompt and the final rubric that defines what golden means for this skill.


## Commands

- quest-golden
